title: AI Business Case Builder: Simplify ROI Calculations for Execs
search_path_label: A 级媒体 / GDELT 路径
full_text:
I spent 30 years in enterprise IT.
I spent 30 years in enterprise IT. Most recently as VP of Technology at Fox Corporation — a role I recently stepped away from as the company reshaped its technology organisation around the AI era.
And in those 30 years, I've never seen anything move as fast as generative AI has since ChatGPT launched in late 2022.
But here's what I have seen — the same thing happen over and over again since that moment.
A team would get excited about AI. They'd find a tool, run a pilot, see real results. And then hit a wall.
Not a technical wall. A business case wall.
Suddenly they needed an ROI model. A payback period. An NPV calculation.
A one-pager for the Sr Management and Finance that didn't look like it was built in a weekend.
And because nobody had a template, they'd either spend weeks building one from scratch — or hire a consultant at $10,000+ to do it for them.
I watched smart, capable people get stuck at that exact moment, including myself. Not because they didn't understand the value of what they were building. But because they didn't have the right tool to articulate it.
So I built one.
The AI Business Case Builder is a 5-tab Excel workbook that takes you from blank page to exec-ready ROI model in under 30 minutes. Labor savings, error reduction, revenue uplift — all risk-adjusted and confidence-weighted. Three-year model. Auto-generated executive briefing. No finance background required.
It's everything I wish had existed every time I had to justify a technology investment to people that needed numbers, not enthusiasm.
$47. One-time download. Available now on Gumroad — link in the comments.
If you know someone trying to get AI approved inside their organization, tag them. This might save them a few weeks.

I spent 30 years in enterprise IT.

And in those 30 years, I've never seen anything move as fast as generative AI has since ChatGPT launched in late 2022.
But here's what I have seen — the same thing happen over and over again since that moment.
A team would get excited about AI. They'd find a tool, run a pilot, see real results. And then hit a wall.
Not a technical wall. A business case wall.
Suddenly they needed an ROI model. A payback period. An NPV calculation.
A one-pager for the Sr Management and Finance that didn't look like it was built in a weekend.
And because nobody had a template, they'd either spend weeks building one from scratch — or hire a consultant at $10,000+ to do it for them.
I watched smart, capable people get stuck at that exact moment, including myself. Not because they didn't understand the value of what they were building. But because they didn't have the right tool to articulate it.
So I built one.
The AI Business Case Builder is a 5-tab Excel workbook that takes you from blank page to exec-ready ROI model in under 30 minutes. Labor savings, error reduction, revenue uplift — all risk-adjusted and confidence-weighted. Three-year model. Auto-generated executive briefing. No finance background required.
It's everything I wish had existed every time I had to justify a technology investment to people that needed numbers, not enthusiasm.
